title: Quary
description: Mine out a square of blocks under you.
body:
# 🪓 Quarry Enchantment Datapack
**Mine more with every swing.**

The Quarry enchantment adds a custom effect to pickaxes: when you break a block, it also breaks several surrounding blocks on the same layer, speeding up mining without touching walls or deeper layers.

## 🔧 Features
- Adds a Quarry enchantment for pickaxes.
  
- Mines blocks around the one you break — same level only.
  
- Walls and lower layers are untouched.
  
- Lightweight, survival-friendly, and multiplayer-compatible.

## 📦 Installation
Place it in your world's datapacks folder.
